name: Micro-Interactions (Spring)
description: Mathematical spring physics for Framer Motion / React Spring. Snappy but tactile.
anti_pattern: Linear CSS transitions for scale/movement (feels mechanical).

name: View Transitions API (Page Routing)
description: Seamless SPA-like transitions between pages. Requires strict DOM node preservation.

name: Scroll-Driven Animations
description: Animation bound to scroll position rather than time. High performance via CSS.
anti_pattern: Using window.addEventListener('scroll') with React state (causes heavy layout thrashing).

name: FLIP Layout Shifts
trigger: Sorting lists, Expanding cards, Filtering grids
description: First, Last, Invert, Play. Only animate Transforms, never animate Width/Height/Top/Left to avoid layout recalculation.
